description: Product Description0.5 ltr durable water sipperLightweight and Shock-resistantThis handy adidas water sipper bottle has a water level indicator and is very easy to maintain. It has a capacity of 500ml and a spout to ensure spill-free usage. Its lightweight ensures that you can take it along with you to stay hydrated everywhere. The wide neck lid allows for quick cleaning of this adidas sipper. Ideal for walking, running, Sports and fitness enthusiasts.
